productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Polka Black Handbag
description: Update your style quotient with ease by adding this stylish bag from lino perros. Roomy and comfortable to carry, the smooth silhouette of this bag blends well with any outfit. Made of Leatherette with a ostrich design for added style Has one zippered compartment with two inner zippers and organiser sleeves for a mobile and essentials Two short handles with metallic embelishments for carrying ease and style One zippered compartment at the back for additional space Metallic embelishment with brand name on the front Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
